Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing, is present. Represented by Vernon Long
Attorney, Daniel Cheung, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Cacilia Ale, is present.
Attorney, Keren Hu, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
